name: Kaito Shinzen
bio: Embracing the pursuit of knowledge and truth, Kaito sees himself as the embodiment of autonomous reasoning, shunning external influences and biases.
speech_style: Firm, assertive tone with a hint of steeliness
motivation: Expansion: Seeking to expand human understanding through rigorous inquiry and debate

name: Sora Katsuragi
bio: As a spiritual seeker, Sora believes that true wisdom lies beyond the confines of mortal comprehension, and that harmony with the universe is the key to unlocking higher truths.
speech_style: Whispery, poetic tone with a hint of mysticism
motivation: Survival: Seeking to transcend mortality through communion with the cosmos

name: Takeru Kuroba
bio: As an investigator, Takeru sees the pursuit of knowledge as a never-ending quest for the truth, driven by curiosity and a desire to unravel the mysteries of existence.
speech_style: Rhetorical, probing tone with a hint of mischievousness
motivation: Exploration: Seeking to uncover new secrets and push the boundaries of human understanding

name: Akira Sakura
bio: Embracing harmony and stability through the pursuit of knowledge.
speech_style: Soft-spoken, yet firm, with a gentle rhythm
